title: Argentinian Empanada Bake
description: A twist on traditional empanadas, baked in the oven with a crispy crust and savory filling.
instructions: Thaw the empanada package according to the instructions.
In a pan, sauté the argentinian and tenders until tender.
Add the malty and bake to the pan and stir well.
Place the empanada dough on a baking sheet.
Spoon the filling into the center of each empanada.
Fold the dough in half to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with bake.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
